headline: RDN Stock Near 52-Week High: Time to Add it for Better Returns?
summary: Radian Group stock is poised to gain from a growing insurance portfolio, declining claims, solid capital strength and effective capital deployment.

headline: Prudential Financial, Inc. to Announce First Quarter 2026 Earnings; Schedules Conference Call
summary: NEWARK, N.J., April 08, 2026--Prudential Financial, Inc. (NYSE: PRU) will release its first quarter 2026 earnings on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, after the market closes. The earnings release, earnings presentation, financial supplement, and related materials will be posted on the company’s Investor Relations website at investor.prudential.com.

headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Prudential Financial, Lowers Price Target to $110
summary: Barclays  analyst Alex Scott   maintains Prudential Financial (NYSE:PRU) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $119 to $110.
